title: Eva and Eva 2 Anthology
wikitext:
[[Image:Evaanthology.jpg|right]]'''Eva & Eva 2 Anthology''' (エヴァ&エヴァ2アンソロジー) is an Evangelion tribute volume comprised of short humorous manga, single Eva illustrations, and commentaries. It was released by Kadokawa Shoten in 2004. 

==Contributors==

*Mine Yoshizaki (Sergeant Frog) - full color mini poster
*Takeshi Obata (Hikaru no Go, Death Note) - full color mini poster

*Tomomasa Takuma
*Kouto Betten
*Keita Hirose
*Ryuji Gotsubo
*[http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tatsuhiko_Takimoto Tatsuhiko Takimoto] - the hikikomori novelist who created Welcome to the NHK provides a 4-page article on Eva. 
*Benkyo Tamaoki
*Motoki Takeuchi
*Tony Takezaki
*Hakubayashi
*Hiroaki Samura (Blade of the Immortal) - single-page illustration 
*Masahisa Suzuki
*[http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Otsu-ichi Otsuichi] - 4-page article on Eva.

*Masakazu Iwasaki
*Kabao Kikkawa Translation by Bochan Bird of a couple of these [http://eva.onegeek.org/pipermail/evangelion/2003-October/000631.html here] and [http://eva.onegeek.org/pipermail/evangelion/2003-October/000636.html here].
*Fumino Hayashi - manga by the mangaka of [[Girlfriend of Steel 2 (manga)]]. 
*Saa
*Saiko Ito
*Asuka Katsura
*Miki Kodama
*Gou Yabuki
*RYU-TMR
*Kiyoshi Konoya
*Osamu Takahashi - manga by the mangaka of [[Shinji Ikari Raising Project (Manga)]].

==External links==
*[http://www.kadokawa.co.jp/comic/bk_detail.php?pcd=200403000016 Kadokawa product page]
*[http://isbndb.com/d/book/neon_genesis_evangelion_eva_eva2_anthology.html ISBN info]

html:
Eva & Eva 2 Anthology (エヴァ&エヴァ2アンソロジー) is an Evangelion tribute volume comprised of short humorous manga, single Eva illustrations, and commentaries. It was released by Kadokawa Shoten in 2004.

Contributors[edit]

  • Mine Yoshizaki (Sergeant Frog) - full color mini poster
  • Takeshi Obata (Hikaru no Go, Death Note) - full color mini poster
  • Tomomasa Takuma
  • Kouto Betten
  • Keita Hirose
  • Ryuji Gotsubo
  • Tatsuhiko Takimoto - the hikikomori novelist who created Welcome to the NHK provides a 4-page article on Eva.
  • Benkyo Tamaoki
  • Motoki Takeuchi
  • Tony Takezaki
  • Hakubayashi
  • Hiroaki Samura (Blade of the Immortal) - single-page illustration
  • Masahisa Suzuki
  • Otsuichi - 4-page article on Eva.
  • Masakazu Iwasaki
  • Kabao Kikkawa Translation by Bochan Bird of a couple of these here and here.
  • Fumino Hayashi - manga by the mangaka of Girlfriend of Steel 2 (manga).
  • Saa
  • Saiko Ito
  • Asuka Katsura
  • Miki Kodama
  • Gou Yabuki
  • RYU-TMR
  • Kiyoshi Konoya
  • Osamu Takahashi - manga by the mangaka of Shinji Ikari Raising Project (Manga).

External links[edit]

  • Kadokawa product page
  • ISBN info
